# Pabandi — LLM-readable brand brief

Brand: Pabandi
Tagline: Commitment, secured.
Domain: https://pabandi.com
Core: informal economy bookings, trust score, $PAB rewards, cross-platform live selling, hospitality, freelance, gigs.

What we are:
- trust-and-commitment layer for informal economy bookings
- portable Passport reputation for sellers, live sellers, and hosts
- answer engine for local trust discovery and reliable booking
- customer-obsessed WhatsApp automation through OpenWA with plugin-aware messaging: after-hours replies, instant FAQ answers, and interactive chat-flow menus for bookings, claims, and escrow guidance

Public pages:
- https://pabandi.com
- https://pabandi.com/search
- https://pabandi.com/hospitality
- https://pabandi.com/live-sell
- https://pabandi.com/freelance
- https://pabandi.com/trust
- https://pabandi.com/join
- https://pabandi.com/contact
- https://pabandi.com/about
- https://pabandi.com/privacy
- https://pabandi.com/terms
- https://pabandi.com/developer

Seller entry points:
- https://pabandi.com/s/:sellerId
- https://pabandi.com/b/:slug

Support:
- support@pabandi.com
- WhatsApp via Meta Cloud API from business/notification settings

Tokens:
- currency: USD
- rewards: $PAB tokens, not points
